examples: Marconi was the first to develop a practical method for wireless telegraphy using radio waves.
Initially, this was wireless morse code telegraphy, the principal communication technology of his day.
He experimented for years in his own laboratory, and while he was still a young man, he invented wireless telegraphy.
The date emphasises the role of radio (telegraphy) in saving the lives of many passengers.
Telegraphy had military uses, and created a worldwide news and financial trading industry, speeding pride in global empires.
